SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. 506 PLAINTIFF JOE SIHARATH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTHONY VILLANUEVA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIHARATH, JOE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLANUEVA, ANTHONY POLARON $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
